# MECH Finance — Build Phases

| Phase | Name | Status | Tag |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Foundation | 🔄 In Progress | v0.1.0 |
| 2 | Core Data Entry | ⏳ Planned | v0.2.0 |
| 3 | Financial Logic | ⏳ Planned | v0.3.0 |
| 4 | Dashboard & Charts | ⏳ Planned | v0.4.0 |
| 5 | Portfolio | ⏳ Planned | v0.5.0 |
| 6 | AI & Polish | ⏳ Planned | v0.6.0 |

## Phase definitions

### Phase 1 — Foundation
Scaffold, config, auth, shell layout, DB schema, docs.
Done when: app loads, auth works, shell renders, all 15 tables exist.

### Phase 2 — Core Data Entry
Accounts CRUD, Categories settings, Quick Add dialog,
Transactions list, Credit Cards CRUD.
Done when: can add accounts and log transactions end-to-end.

### Phase 3 — Financial Logic
Balance computation, Budgets, Credits & Debts,
Transfers, Goals + fund flow.
Done when: all money movements work, balances update correctly.

### Phase 4 — Dashboard & Charts
Dashboard assembly, all Recharts components,
Recurring payments page.
Done when: dashboard shows real data, all charts render.

### Phase 5 — Portfolio
Asset + liability CRUD, snapshot logging,
net worth calculation, Portfolio overview.
Done when: net worth tracks over time with history charts.

### Phase 6 — AI & Polish
Claude API edge functions, all 5 AI features,
tooltips, onboarding, empty states, keyboard shortcuts, CSV export.
Done when: app is fully polished and AI features work.
